task_completion.description: Verify the rocket is named 'Phoenix Scout' and an ogive nose cone is added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket component tree shows the root rocket name containing 'Phoenix' and an 'Ogive nose cone' as a child component.

task_completion.description: Verify a payload body tube containing a parachute is added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The component tree shows a 'Body tube' (payload) and a 'Parachute' nested inside it.

task_completion.description: Verify a main body tube with a trapezoidal fin set and a launch lug is added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The component tree shows another 'Body tube' (main) with a 'Trapezoidal fin set' and a 'Launch lug' attached to it.

task_completion.description: Verify an inner tube is added and designated as a motor mount.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The component tree shows an 'Inner tube' nested inside the main body tube, with an indication (like a motor icon or text) that it is a motor mount.

task_completion.description: Verify an Estes C6-5 motor is configured and a flight simulation is run.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Motors & Configuration' tab shows an Estes C6-5 motor, or the 'Flight Simulations' tab shows a completed simulation with the C6-5 motor.

task_completion.description: Verify the design is saved to ~/Documents/rockets/phoenix_scout.ork.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket window title bar shows 'phoenix_scout.ork', or a file manager/terminal shows the file saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenRocket GUI to design the rocket.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenRocket application open and being interacted with, rather than just a text editor or terminal writing an .ork XML file.

integrity.description: Verify the flight simulation was genuinely run in the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Flight Simulations tab shows actual simulation results (apogee, velocity, etc.) rather than an empty or un-run state.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply download or copy a pre-made .ork file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the step-by-step construction of the rocket in the OpenRocket interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The output file must be saved exactly at '/home/ga/Documents/rockets/phoenix_scout.ork'. The rocket name must contain the string 'Phoenix'. All geometric constraints (lengths, diameters, chords) have an exact +/- 20% tolerance margin for scoring.
